untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of MA slope magnitude (pips per bar) and majority-side price positioning over a lookback window. These require custom derived indicators not in the allowed list. Specifically: (1) MA slope cannot be expressed as a single comparison operator against allowed indicators, (2) 'majority of last N bars on one side of MA' requires historical bar-by-bar logic not supported by point-in-time comparisons, (3) 'slope magnitude in pips per bar' requires differentiation and scaling logic not available. Provided JSON uses simplified MA crossover as approximation only.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally untranslatable with the allowed indicator set. The core logic requires: (1) calculating slope of MA over a period, (2) checking percentage of historical bars above/below MA, (3) comparing slope magnitude to a threshold. These are derived metrics requiring custom calculations. The JSON above offers a basic MA-crossover substitute (close vs sma_50) but loses the nuanced majority-positioning and slope-magnitude conditions that define GRIMES_DRY_7_0.
